title: The Bug With a Sting So Bad You Just Lie Down
script: This wasp has a sting so bad that experts say your only advice is to lie down and scream. It's the tarantula hawk. It hunts one of the scariest spiders alive, the tarantula, and it usually wins. It stings the spider to paralyze it, then drags the living body back to its burrow. It lays a single egg on the spider, and when the larva hatches, it eats the still-living tarantula from the inside, saving the vital organs for last. Its sting ranks near the top of the entire insect world. So what could possibly make a giant spider the easy part?
